Interface ITiledMapServer2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to members that serve tiled maps.

[Guid("B5339959-B276-4485-AC86-15F3A9A40395")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITiledMapServer2 : ITiledMapServer

Methods
